name: kntnt-wp-skills
description: Kntnt's WordPress-skills plugin — mirror a live WordPress site down into a local DDEV copy: `clone` a fresh copy of production, or `pull` to refresh an existing one, driven solely through the Kntnt Extractor plugin's REST API; `mkwp` to scaffold a brand-new local site from nothing; or `build-ollie-site` to build one out on the Ollie block theme, bottom-up by Atomic Design.

plugins.name: kntnt-wp-skills
plugins.description: Mirror a live WordPress site down into a local DDEV copy, scaffold a brand-new one from nothing, or build one out on the Ollie block theme. Four user-invoked skills: `clone` creates a fresh local copy of a production site and `pull` refreshes an existing one incrementally, both reaching production solely through the Kntnt Extractor plugin's REST API — never over SSH; `mkwp` scaffolds a brand-new local site standalone; and `build-ollie-site` builds a coherent, token-correct site on Ollie, bottom-up by Atomic Design, from a design system and a set of mockups.
